title: Missing support for non-point geometry types in  VirtuosoInputStream (VirtJdbc4_1 / 7.2.0_p1)
description:
It appears that the virtjdbc4_1.jar driver of VOS 7.2.0_p1 does not implement reading rdf boxes for any geometry type except point - for e.g. LINESTRING it gives an error:
Sparql Insert Into <http://example.org/test/> { <http://example.org/foo>    <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#asWKT> "LINESTRING(126.440000 37.463300,126.451000 37.449200)"^^<http://www.openlinksw.com/schemas/virtrdf#Geometry> }

VirtGraph graph = new VirtGraph("http://example.org/test/", /* your connection settings */);
graph.find(null, null, null);
will cause
Caused by: virtuoso.jdbc4.VirtuosoException: General error
    at virtuoso.jdbc4.VirtuosoInputStream.readRdfBox(VirtuosoInputStream.java:472
        ...
Caused by: java.lang.NumberFormatException: For input string: "RING(12.236400"
    at sun.misc.FloatingDecimal.readJavaFormatString(FloatingDecimal.java:1250)

IntelliJ will show a decompiled version of the class where the VirtuosoInputStream tries to remove the first 6 characters - i.e. POINT( from the string and try to parse a subsequent double - however, that won't work for a line string.
I tried using the VirtJdbc 2 and 3 drivers, however, they do not work with the fixed VirtJena version of #360
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE geometry_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, geom BLOB NOT NULL);
SELECT id, ST_AsText(geom) FROM geometry_test WHERE geom IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Non-point geometry types not supported in VirtuosoInputStream
